ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state where the county is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state where the county is located */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the demographic data was recorded */,
  "population_stay_at_home" INTEGER /* Population that stayed at home */,
  "population_not_stay_at_home" INTEGER /* Population that did not stay at home */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility" (
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility data point */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the mobility data was recorded */,
  "trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips */,
  "trips_1" INTEGER /* Trips taken within 1 mile */,
  "trips_1_3" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 1-3 miles */,
  "trips_3_5" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 3-5 miles */,
  "trips_5_10" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 5-10 miles */,
  "trips_10_25" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 10-25 miles */,
  "trips_25_50" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 25-50 miles */,
  "trips_50_100" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 50-100 miles */,
  "trips_100_250" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 100-250 miles */,
  "trips_250_500" INTEGER /* Trips taken between 250-500 miles */,
  "trips_500" INTEGER /* Trips taken over 500 miles */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mobility data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mobility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_demographics, edit_mobility) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., demographics, mobility) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made on the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
